text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Pit, pat, pit, pat...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have never faltered from my path as<n>the
Overlord. It has always been up,<n>to the peak of the
mountain and<n>beyond.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now I face a mountain range I've<n>never
conquered before.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year, and the<n>Arima Kinen has
finally arrived! The<n>crowd here is more excited
than ever<n>for this dream match!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Old meets new in this pivotal clash!<n>Our first
tried-and-true runner is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The biggest, the strongest, the<n>highest! No one's
reachin' my<n>plateau!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa, the Phantom Bird<n>who flies higher
than the Andes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She's my generous benefactor who<n>showed me
how a true ruler battles<n>during this year's summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And our second contender...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
With grace, I seek a height of skill as<n>great as Mt.
Fuji.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder, the cultural<n>juggernaut hailing
from the United<n>States. Her unwavering faith in her
abilities is the source of her<n>composure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
One of the twin peaks of the older<n>generation—I
couldn't ask for a better<n>obstacle to overcome.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If memory serves, the highest<n>mountain in
existence is 8,848 meters<n>tall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I shall supersede that height... by<n>three
millimeters!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You might scoff that practically<n>anyone could go an
extra three<n>meager millimeters. However!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Once surpassed, those three<n>millimeters can never
again be<n>overcome, not even in hundreds of
millions of years!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that... is the power of the<n>Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Fwip!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And now, this year's most promising<n>contender!
T.M. Opera O has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah! What presence...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El emperador... The mighty monarch...<n>Yep.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's not a king of merely comedy<n>anymore!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They each have their own fierce,<n>daunting aura as
they boldly descend<n>onto the grounds of the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, shall we fulfill that<n>promise we made
the day we met?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you must know how this<n>final scene will
play out.
choice_data_list: With you being crowned the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Precisely. It will mark the dawning of<n>a new age.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: One with me, the Centurial Overlord, at<n>its focus.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Doto, Ayabe... Watch me now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Watch me as I take to the fertile fields<n>of
Nakayama with saber in hand and<n>forever
engrave our generation's<n>mark for all to see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Today, I am a challenger no more.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the one who shall bring an end<n>to the old,
crumbling age! Come at<n>me, o beloved heroes of
the bygone<n>era!
